title: Diplomatic Immunities and Privileges: Subsidiary Legislation
title_en: Diplomatic Immunities and Privileges: Subsidiary Legislation

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Diplomatic Immunities and Privileges (Conferment of Personal Immunities and Privileges) Order.

provisions.title: Conferment of certain personal immunities and privileges
provisions.content:
2. Conferment of certain personal immunities and privileges
(1) Each of the officers designated in Part I of the Schedule shall have all the immunities and privileges set out in Part II of the Second Schedule to the Act.
(2) Each officer belonging to a class of officers designated in Part II of the Schedule shall have all the immunities and privileges set out in Part III of the Second Schedule to the Act.
(3) Each officer belonging to a class of officers designated in Part III of the Schedule shall have the privilege set out in paragraph 11 of Part III of the Second Schedule to the Act alone, namely, exemption from income tax in respect of emoluments received as an officer of the organisation in question.
